heading: Applicability
label: 5411b Applicability
text: The requirements of this chapter shall be applicable only to fasteners fabricated 180 days or more after , except that if a manufacturer or distributor of fasteners fabricated before , prepares a record of conformance for such fasteners, representations about such fasteners shall be subject to the requirements of this chapter.June 8, 1999June 8, 1999
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 8 and is classified to .section 11 of Pub. L. 101–592section 5410 of this title
